## Which question are you addressing?

- [ ] What data should NEVER be stored directly in Git?
- [ ] How should consent be recorded?
- [ ] How should withdrawal be handled?
- [ ] How should biometric/voice/image data be referenced safely?
- [ ] What should be forbidden even with consent?
- [ ] How should heirs/guardians interact with archives?
- [ ] How should AI-generated content be marked?
- [ ] Other (please specify)
